goal: Return the quantile demand forecast and newsvendor-picked bake quantity for one SKU-day at a branch.

outputs.name: quantile_forecast
outputs.description: Map qX.X -> units (e.g. q0.5, q0.7, q0.9)

outputs.name: confidence
outputs.description: 0..1, flags low-confidence rows for downstream gates

constraints: Numeric output (quantile values, bake_quantity) comes from GBM / prior / TimesFM — never from an LLM.
Forecast quantity is non-negative and rounded to integer units.
Confidence < 0.4 must set the low_confidence flag for downstream skills.
branch_id must pass assertBranchAccess() — RBAC is not bypassable.

evolvable_surface.post_forecast_adjustments: Multiplicative overlay applied AFTER the deterministic forecaster runs and BEFORE newsvendor selection. Lets the harness learn branch- or brand-level day-of-week, event, and SKU corrections without touching the GBM artifact.
evolvable_surface.newsvendor_cost_ratio: Per-skill (cu, co) override, with cu/(cu+co) as the target quantile.
evolvable_surface.routing_overrides: Per-SKU or per-event overrides for forecast-router stage selection (e.g. force prior for a new SKU with <30 actuals).

trace_emits: forecast_snapshots (existing). Each call is one trace event linked to a model_version_id.
